zh.lifeSummary: 當Teresa Vázquez del Saz於1290年出生在葡萄牙可布拉塔布華時，她的父親Vasco Martins da Cunha, 5º Sr. de Tábua31歲，母親Senhorinha Fernandes de Chacim25歲。她於1307年與Fernán Gómez de Toledo在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1334年8月30日在西班牙享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Teresa Vázquez del Saz于1290年出生在葡萄牙可布拉塔布華时，她的父亲Vasco Martins da Cunha, 5º Sr. de Tábua31岁，母亲Senhorinha Fernandes de Chacim25岁。她于1307年与Fernán Gómez de Toledo在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1334年8月30日在西班牙享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vázquez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Carlos, Manuel, Jorge, Miguel, Francisco, Jesus, Pedro, Rafael, Raul.

variants.name: Vasquez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Carlos, Manuel, Jesus, Luis, Francisco, Miguel, Mario, Jorge, Pedro, Guadalupe.
Spanish (also Vásquez): patronymic from the personal name Vasco .

variants.name: Vazguez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Vázquez (see Vazquez ).

variants.name: Vaquez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Vázquez (see Vazquez ).

variants.name: Vazques
meanings: Spanish: variant of Vázquez (see Vazquez and Vasquez ).

nameMeanings.name: del
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Lorraine): variant of the habitational name Delle 2 or a masculine form of a homonymous topographic name. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Spanish or Italian preposition with fused definite article del ‘of the’, which forms first part of surnames such as Del Cid and Del Signore , has apparently been in some instances counted as an independent surname.

variants.name: Delle
meanings: German: habitational name from a place so named in North Rhine-Westphalia or a topographic name (see   Dell  ).

French (Lorraine): habitational name from Delle, a place in Territoire de Belfort. Alternatively, a topographic name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone who lived near a prominent alder tree or trees, from elle, a derivative of Middle High German erle ‘alder’.

nameMeanings.name: Saz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Hak, Pang, Ry, Thay, Leang, Hai, Him, Chan, Heang, Sarin.  Cambodian Chamroeun, Savoeun, Sokhom, Vuthy.
Cambodian: written ស, from a Khmer word meaning e.g. ‘white, fair’. Compare   Sor   1.
Cambodian: written សរ, from a Khmer word meaning ‘arrow’. Compare   Sor   2.

variants.name: Sor
meanings: Cambodian: written ស, from a Khmer word meaning e.g. ‘white, fair’. Compare   Sar   1.
Cambodian: written សរ, from a Khmer word meaning ‘arrow’. Compare   Sar   2.

nameMeanings.name: Teresa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Theresa .  In the English-speaking world the name is often chosen in this spelling by Roman Catholics, with particular reference to the Spanish saint, Teresa of Ávila (  Teresa Cepeda de Ahumada ,  1515–82 ).

variants.name: Theresa
meanings: Of problematic origin. The name seems to have been first used in Spain and Portugal, and, according to tradition, was the name of the wife of St Paulinus of Nola, who spent most of his life in Spain; she was said to have originated (and to have derived her name) from the Greek island of Thēra. However, this story is neither factually nor etymologically confirmed.

variants.name: Teresia
meanings: Of problematic origin. The name seems to have been first used in Spain and Portugal, and, according to tradition, was the name of the wife of St Paulinus of Nola, who spent most of his life in Spain; she was said to have originated (and to have derived her name) from the Greek island of Thēra. However, this story is neither factually nor etymologically confirmed.

en.lifeSummary: When Teresa Vázquez del Saz was born in 1290, in Tábua, Coimbra, Portugal, her father, Vasco Martins da Cunha, 5º Sr. de Tábua, was 31 and her mother, Senhorinha Fernandes de Chacim, was 25. She married Fernán Gómez de Toledo in 1307, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 30 August 1334, in Spain, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Teresa Vázquez del Saz est née en 1290, à Tábua, Coimbra, Portugal, son père, Vasco Martins da Cunha, 5º Sr. de Tábua, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Senhorinha Fernandes de Chacim, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Fernán Gómez de Toledo en 1307, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 août 1334, à Espagne, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Teresa Vázquez del Saz 1290 in Tábua, Coimbra, Portugal geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Vasco Martins da Cunha, 5º Sr. de Tábua 31 und ihre Mutter Senhorinha Fernandes de Chacim 25. Sie hat 1307 in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien Fernán Gómez de Toledo geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. August 1334 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Spanien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Teresa Vázquez del Saz è nata il nel 1290 nel Tábua, Coimbra, Portogallo, sua padre, Vasco Martins da Cunha, 5º Sr. de Tábua, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Senhorinha Fernandes de Chacim, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Fernán Gómez de Toledo nel 1307, nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 30 agosto 1334, nel Spagna, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Teresa Vázquez del Sazが1290年にポルトガルコインブラトaブアで生まれた時，父Vasco Martins da Cunha, 5º Sr. de Tábuaは31歳，母Senhorinha Fernandes de Chacimは25歳であった。1307年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドでFernán Gómez de Toledoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1334年8月30日にスペインで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Teresa Vázquez del Saz(이)가 1290년 포르투갈 코임브라 트a버아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Vasco Martins da Cunha, 5º Sr. de Tábua(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Senhorinha Fernandes de Chacim(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1307년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 Fernán Gómez de Toledo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1334년 8월 30일 스페인에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

historicEvents.title: Portugal
historicEvents.description: Portugal is one of the oldest nations in Europe having established its continental frontier as it is set today in 1297

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Teresa Vázquez del Saz nasceu em 1290, em Tábua, Coimbra, Portugal, seu pai, Vasco Martins da Cunha, 5º Sr. de Tábua, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Senhorinha Fernandes de Chacim, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Fernán Gómez de Toledo em 1307, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de agosto de 1334, em Espanha, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Teresa Vázquez del Saz родилась в 1290 г. в местности тaбуа, коимбра, Португалия, её отцу по имени Vasco Martins da Cunha, 5º Sr. de Tábua было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Senhorinha Fernandes de Chacim, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Fernán Gómez de Toledo в 1307 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 30 августа 1334 г. в местности Испания в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Teresa Vázquez del Saz nació en 1290, en Tábua, Coimbra, Portugal, su papá, Vasco Martins da Cunha, 5º Sr. de Tábua, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Senhorinha Fernandes de Chacim, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Fernán Gómez de Toledo en 1307, en Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 30 de agosto de 1334, en España, a la edad de 44 años.
